title: Manufacturing Engineer - LG Electronics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - LG Electronics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at LG Electronics India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About LG Electronics India:
LG Electronics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Electronics India!
